stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → ACR.Equivalent (□x) (□y)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → ACR.Equivalent (⊠x) (⊠y)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent (⊠g.1) (⊠⊠g.1)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ ACR.Refutable g.1
